title: Turn 10,994 Notes Into Memory - Paul Iusztin, Decoding AI & Louis-François Bouchard, Towards AI
summary: Paul Iusztin and Louis-François Bouchard present an AI Research OS system that converts 10,000+ Obsidian notes, documents, and repositories into structured context for AI agents. The system uses a three-layer architecture of raw content, indexing, and a Wiki layer to enable efficient deep research and retrieval without requiring vector or graph databases.
writeup: Paul Iusztin and Louis-François Bouchard demonstrate an AI Research OS that converts more than 10,000 Obsidian notes, documents, and repositories into structured context for AI agents. The system is built on a three-layer architecture: raw content, an indexing layer, and a Wiki layer. The notable claim is that this setup supports deep research and retrieval without a vector or graph database, relying instead on on-disk indexing.
